title: Jan-15 college-app deadline checklist
html:
TL;DR

  • New-Year's-Eve-2020 senior-year checklist as Yahir prepares for the Jan-15 OSU / Renaissance / Ford / JCEF application sprint — Renaissance due Feb 1.
  • "College easy route option with yermy" — the first hint Yahir is considering co-enrolling with his brother as a fallback; the sibling-as-co-conspirator move that would resurface across the family arc.
  • Bundles administrative todos (car light, lunch with David) with reflective ones ("come up with crazy goals") — the form fusing logistics + ambition in one note.
  • Companion to the Nov 15 scholarship essays note six weeks earlier — same four-scholarship target list (OSU, Renaissance, Ford, JCEF) — confirming this was Yahir's senior year application portfolio.
  • "Crazy goals" line is the embryo of the "master plan" phrase that crystallizes in 2022 — Yahir already thinks in life document terms at 17.

Note

A 9-line todo at the year-boundary. The Jan-15 deadline anchored Yahir's whole senior year — every scholarship he was chasing fed into either OSU directly or Ford / Renaissance / JCEF funding. The "easy route option with yermy" is a load-bearing line: it surfaces the brother-route as a real Plan B before Yahir settled on solo-OSU. Lunch with David sits alongside scholarship work — the long friendship thread continuing in parallel. The closing "come up with crazy goals" bullet is the manifesto instinct showing up as a TODO item.

Connections

  • renaissance scholarship · ford family foundation · jcef · osu
  • yermy — co-enrollment idea
  • 2020 11 15 scholarship essays todo — same scholarship list
  • master plan — "crazy goals" as proto-manifest

related.label: Scholarship essays — Nov 2020 senior-year hustle map
